footer.text: The Center for Public Policy, State Administration, and Social Development (KAPDEM) was established to conduct studies focusing on fundamental public, administrative, administrative, and political decisions in political science and public administration, public policies, and economic, social, cultural, and societal issues in Turkey, develop projects, and contribute to innovative and solution-oriented approaches.KAPDEM is a completely independent, impartial, and volunteer-based think tank. It has no organic affiliation or relationship with any political party, interest group, pressure group, or national/international/transnational structure. Its founding principle is to remain independent and impartial.
footer.mailtext: Subscribe to our newsletter and be the first to know about new content and developments.

donatePage.title: KAPDEM
donatePage.subtitle: Center for Public Policy, State Governance and Social Development
donatePage.description: KAPDEM is an independent think tank in Turkey that generates knowledge and develops solution-oriented recommendations in the fields of public policy, state governance, and social development. Our aim is to contribute to the formation of policies that strengthen public interest, sense of justice, and social welfare.
donatePage.expandedDescription: Each project is designed as a step towards shaping public policies in Turkey in a more participatory, transparent, and effective manner. The research we conduct aims to produce public benefit in a wide range of areas, from administrative reforms to solving social problems, from democratic governance to sustainable development. Every support you provide to KAPDEM is not just a contribution; it is an investment in knowledge, science, and social development. Your donations enable new research to be implemented, young researchers to be supported, and public policies to become more just, inclusive, and sustainable. With our independent, impartial, and volunteer-based structure; join us on this journey guided by science, reason, and public responsibility.
donatePage.whyDonateTitle: Why Should You Donate to KAPDEM?

whyDonateReasons.title: For Society:
whyDonateReasons.description: KAPDEM is an independent think tank aimed at strengthening public interest, social development, and sense of justice. Your donations directly contribute to achieving these goals.

whyDonateReasons.title: Scientific and Lasting Impact:
whyDonateReasons.description: Every support transforms into research and analysis work aimed at shaping public policies in a more effective, participatory, and sustainable manner.

whyDonateReasons.title: Independence and Impartiality:
whyDonateReasons.description: KAPDEM works only for society, knowledge, and public interest without establishing organic ties with any political structure or interest group. You too can contribute to independent and impartial thought and public interest!
You too can contribute to independent and impartial thought and public interest!

workAreasContent: KAPDEM is an independent think tank that contributes to policy development processes in Turkey through its scientific research and intellectual production activities in the fields of public policy, state governance, and social development. At the center of its work is the development of evidence-based and sustainable policy recommendations that consider public interest.

The organization addresses the design, implementation, evaluation, and development processes of public policies from a holistic perspective. It conducts solution-oriented research in structural reform areas that will increase effectiveness, accountability, and participation in state governance. In this context, it focuses on governance models, administrative reforms, governance mechanisms, decision-making processes, and public performance systems.

KAPDEM also develops projects that support social development. It aims to produce solutions to social problems and make a difference in areas such as equality, inclusiveness, education, employment, and democratic participation. It analyzes not only the administrative but also the social impacts of public policies and proposes holistic approaches accordingly.

Publication and research activities cover a wide range including public policies, governance design and reform, global policy and international relations, economy and development, technology and innovation, migration, defense and security. Reports, evaluations, policy notes, and analyses prepared in these areas create a knowledge sharing network open to public institutions, academia, civil society, and the public.
KAPDEM continues to contribute to shaping public policies in a more just, participatory, and sustainable manner with its evidence-based analyses, impartial stance, and public responsibility.

generalRules.title: General Rules
items: Content containing copyright infringement is not accepted
Articles containing insults, profanity, or hate speech will be rejected
Scientific and objective language is expected
Your article's subject must be related to KAPDEM's areas of interest

items: Article must be at least 800 words
Summary section should be between 200-300 words
Must comply with spelling and grammar rules
Compliance with academic writing standards is preferred

publishProcess.title: Publishing Process
items: Submitted articles are reviewed by our editors
Accepted articles will be published and you will be notified
Feedback is provided for rejected articles
No royalties are paid for published articles

hero.title: KAPDEM
hero.subtitle: About Us
hero.description: The Center for Public Policy, Government Administration and Social Development (KAPDEM) was established in Türkiye to conduct studies, develop projects, and contribute to innovative and solution-oriented approaches focused on political science and public administration, public policies, and fundamental public, administrative/political decisions in economic, social, cultural, and societal issues.

whatIsKapdem.title: What is KAPDEM?
whatIsKapdem.description: The Center for Public Policy, State Governance and Social Development (KAPDEM) was established in Turkey to conduct studies, develop projects, and contribute to innovative and solution-oriented approaches focused on political science and public administration, public policies, and fundamental public, administrative/political decisions in economic, social, cultural, and social issues. KAPDEM is a think tank established entirely independently, impartially, and on a voluntary basis. It has no organic connection or relationship with any political party, interest group, pressure group, or national/international/transnational structure. Independence and impartiality have been adopted as the fundamental founding principles.

publishingPrinciple.title: KAPDEM Publishing Principles and Legal Responsibility
publishingPrinciple.description: KAPDEM accepts article requests from all individuals and institutions, especially corporate members and volunteer supporters, who are permanent/staff writers or wish to contribute as guest writers, within a certain editorial review framework to contribute to public policies and public debate culture, and to inform the public. KAPDEM considers it important in terms of social production, sharing and development to work with a perspective that prioritizes scientific and social values and to mediate the sharing of views shaped in this direction with the public, and is therefore open to contributions from all individuals and institutions as writers. KAPDEM accepts as correct the personal information shared by authors who submit their articles and works for publication and publishes them accordingly. KAPDEM may also republish various articles published on other platforms, respecting copyright, to contribute to the making and evaluation process of public policies and the culture of social debate. It includes articles and works that have not been subjected to editorial review and inspection, but whose publication has been approved to contribute to social debates by only examining whether there is a legal problem in their publication, in the 'free tribune' category. All articles and works on KAPDEM are published to contribute to a constructive debate culture. Therefore, articles and works published under all other categories, especially the 'free tribune' category, definitely do not reflect KAPDEM's institutional view and cannot be considered or accepted as KAPDEM's institutional view. All legal responsibility for published articles and works belongs to the authors.

membershipPage.heroDescription: Join our research in public policy, government administration, and social development. Work alongside our expert team.
membershipPage.selectPlanTitle: Choose the Membership Plan That Fits You Best
membershipPage.selectPlanDescription: KAPDEM membership provides priority access to our current research, analysis, and reports in public policy, government administration, and social development. Members can closely follow the organization's work, access special files and evaluations, and be informed in advance about member-only sessions and events. Additionally, they have priority rights to KAPDEM's closed meetings, workshops, and special publication shares. Membership offers a privileged platform for access and contribution to evidence-based policy production.

free.name: Basic
free.description: KAPDEM members have the privilege of being closer to thought production and public policy work. Membership offers not only access but also knowledge-based interaction and sharing opportunities.
free.notice: Start now, no credit card required
features: Access to exclusive publications and analysis content for members only
Priority notification of public events, panels, and workshops organized by KAPDEM
Access to KAPDEM newsletter and current research announcements
Access to two special dossiers prepared exclusively for members
Ability to download publications and research reports in PDF format

researcher.name: Researcher - Student
researcher.description: KAPDEM Researcher Membership is a comprehensive membership model developed for academics, experts, researchers, and policy analysts. This membership offers the privilege of access to in-depth research, participation in exclusive content, and placement in the internal knowledge-sharing network. A professional membership model developed for academics, experts, and policy researchers.
features: Full access to all publications and archive content within KAPDEM
Priority access to current and special Research Reports
Invitation to all events and closed sessions organized by KAPDEM
Unlimited access to all Special Dossiers prepared for members
Benefit from all basic membership advantages (newsletter, forum, public events, PDF downloads, etc.)

corporate.name: Corporate
corporate.description: KAPDEM Corporate Membership is a multi-user, strategic collaboration-based membership model developed for public institutions, local governments, civil society organizations, think tanks, and private sector representatives. Corporate membership provides information, content, and interaction opportunities that will directly contribute to institutions' policy development, analysis, strategic planning, and governance processes.
features: Multi-user access and strategic collaboration model for public institutions, NGOs, and the private sector.
Unlimited access to KAPDEM's entire research and publication archive
Corporate access rights for up to 10 users
Invitation to special events, closed sessions, and collaboration meetings organized by KAPDEM
Support and information service responded to within 24 hours
Visibility on collaboration pages with corporate logo and promotion
Full benefit from all researcher and basic membership advantages

strategic.name: Strategic Partner
strategic.description: Premium solution for large-scale institutions and special research projects
features: All corporate advantages included
Special research projects and consulting
Unlimited user access
24/7 VIP support line
Unlimited publication rights
Special event organization
Dedicated consultant assignment
Custom reporting and analysis

whyKapdem.title: Why Should You Become a KAPDEM Member?

expertise.title: Proven Expertise
expertise.description: With 8 years of experience, we are Turkey's leading organization in public policy. We provide reliable information with 150+ research reports and 25 expert researchers.

currentAnalysis.title: Current and Objective Analysis
currentAnalysis.description: We support your decision-making processes with our constantly updated content and objective analysis.

network.title: Extensive Network and Collaboration
network.description: Gain access to a strong professional network with 500+ active members and 50+ corporate partners.

cancellation.question: How to cancel membership?
cancellation.answer: You can cancel your membership at any time. Simply contact our support team for the cancellation process.

payment.question: What are the payment options?
payment.answer: You can pay with credit card, debit card, and bank transfer. Special payment plans are also available for corporate memberships.

trial.question: Is there a trial period?
trial.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial period for all packages. You can test all features during this period.

change.question: Can I change my plan?
change.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Price differences are calculated proportionally.

cta.title: Start Now
cta.description: Join Turkey's leading public policy research center. Meet our expert team and comprehensive research.
